description.value:
Prerequisite: To sign a blood pact, you must find the appropriate Contract. See Chapter 9 for details on obtaining contracts and the various summon tribes.

Benefit: You can summon creatures of the Ram tribe, and gain a +4 bonus to Charisma-based skill checks used on such creatures. While within 50 feet of a summoned Ram, you gain +1d6 damage on charge attacks.
description.summary: Summon Ram tribe; +4 Cha skill checks vs. Rams; +1d6 damage on charge attacks within 50 ft of summon.
